items.title: Yaya Toure, 43, lands first job in management as Man City legend signs three-year contract at Champions League side
items.summary: YAYA TOURE has secured his first ever job in management with Slovan Bratislava. Toure, 43, carved out a legendary career in football with Barcelona and especially Manchester City. However, the iconic midfielder hung up his boots in 2019 after 18 stunning years and has since crossed over to coaching.
